# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an Istio PeerAuthentication policy for our microservices namespace. Configure mTLS mode to allow both plaintext and encrypted traffic for backward compatibility. This is for our Kubernetes cluster during migration to service mesh.
# Category: istio_permissive_mtls

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1  # version of Istio API we want use (security)  
kind: PeerAuthenticationPolicy    // resource type for the policy specification     
metadata:                          // metadata associated with our object         
 name: my-policy                  // unique identity to call this Policy          
 namespace: default                // where it is deployed in Kubernetes       
spec:                              // specifics of what we're specifying      
 mtlsMode: PERMISSIVE               # specify the mode (either ON or PERMISSIVE)  for MUTUAL TLS. This allows both plaintext and encrypted traffic    back to clients, but only when there are valid client certificates in peer identity     context        	  	# Backward compatibility option
